data.title: Update CLAUDE.md: add hierarchy enforcement note in ticket system section
data.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## TDD Exemption
test-exempt: static assets only / non-executable instruction file (Rule 5 of behavioral testing standard). Structural boundary assertions replace behavioral tests.

## What
Append a concise hierarchy enforcement note to the "Ticket system v3 (event-sourced)" paragraph in `CLAUDE.md`. Do NOT duplicate the full promotion/rejection tables from cli-reference — just a pointer with summary.

## Implementation Steps

1. In `CLAUDE.md`, find the "Ticket system v3 (event-sourced)" paragraph (around line 47).
2. At the end of the sentence about `ticket link`, append:

   **Before:**
   `| Link tickets | `.claude/scripts/dso ticket link <src> <tgt> <relation>` |`

   **After (Quick Reference table row — no change needed, link command unchanged).**

3. In the "Ticket system v3 (event-sourced)" dense paragraph, locate the section describing the Jira bridge or after the suggestion-capture sentence, and append:
   
   **`ticket link` hierarchy enforcement**: `ticket link` enforces hierarchy — cross-boundary links are automatically promoted to the appropriate ancestor level (task→task across stories becomes story→story; task/story across epics becomes epic→epic). Direct parent-child and circular links are rejected with a non-zero exit. Use `--dry-run` to preview without writing. See `plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md` under `link → Hierarchy Enforcement` for full rules and examples.

4. Ensure no promotion/rejection tables are copied into CLAUDE.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] File `CLAUDE.md` exists
  Verify: test -f CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md contains a reference to `hierarchy enforcement` or `Hierarchy Enforcement` in the ticket system section
  Verify: grep -q '[Hh]ierarchy enforcement\|hierarchy-aware\|enforces hierarchy' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md references cli-reference for full details (no self-contained promotion table)
  Verify: grep -q 'ticket-cli-reference\|cli-reference' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md does NOT contain the full promotion rules table (cross-story/cross-epic table)
  Verify: ! grep -q 'story-X.*story-Y' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] `--dry-run` is mentioned in CLAUDE.md hierarchy note
  Verify: grep -q 'dry-run' CLAUDE.md
- [ ] The CLAUDE.md addition is in the ticket system section (not in Critical Rules or another section)
  Verify: awk '/Ticket system v3/,/Hook architecture/' CLAUDE.md | grep -q 'hierarch\|dry-run'
